title: Module 5.2: UK Post-Brexit Regulations
subtitle: Navigate UKCA, HSE Guidance & the Safety of Display Lasers Framework
description: Master UK laser safety requirements post-Brexit, including the transition from CE to UKCA marking, the Safety of Display Lasers guidance (replacing HS(G)95), and specific requirements for venues, operators, and LSOs. Features interactive UKCA vs CE comparator and venue safety zone visualizer.
learning_objectives: Understand post-Brexit changes to UK laser regulations
Differentiate between CE and UKCA marking requirements
Apply the Safety of Display Lasers guidance in practice
Define roles and responsibilities (LSO, Operator, Venue, Supplier)
Calculate and implement safety zone separations
Complete proper sign-off and documentation procedures

badge.name: UK Compliance Specialist
badge.description: Mastered UK post-Brexit laser safety regulations

standards_reference: Control of Artificial Optical Radiation at Work Regulations 2010
Health and Safety at Work etc. Act 1974

research_alignment.adult_learning: Role-based learning with real venue scenarios
